package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for gin_handler_uses_action_param_switch_for_many_use_cases: Handlers that branch on `action`, `type`, or mode strings to serve many workflows from one endpoint function.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule052NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule052NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule052NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario052Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule052NegativeService, input Rule052NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
